scripts.backend:pip: cd backend && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.backend:install: npm run backend:venv && npm run backend:pip && npm run backend:playwright
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.frontend:dev: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm run backend:install && npm run frontend
scripts.clean: rm -f backend/*.png backend/*.graphml backend/*.geojson backend/*.json || true
